=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/missedPipeableOpportunity_safer.ts(11,1): warning TS377050: This nested call structure has a pipeable form. `Effect.log("Hello").pipe(...)` represents the same call sequence in pipe style and may be easier to read. effect(missedPipeableOpportunity)
/.src/missedPipeableOpportunity_safer.ts(16,1): warning TS377050: This nested call structure has a pipeable form. `Effect.succeed(console.log(Effect.runPromise(Effect.log("Hello")))).pipe(...)` represents the same call sequence in pipe style and may be easier to read. effect(missedPipeableOpportunity)


==== /.src/tsconfig.json (0 errors) ====
    {
      "compilerOptions": {
        "plugins": [
          {
            "name": "@effect/language-service",
            "pipeableMinArgCount": 2
          }
        ]
      }
    }
    

==== /.src/missedPipeableOpportunity_safer.ts (2 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics missedPipeableOpportunity:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    // this should not trigger because console.log is not a pipeable operation
    // so it would be console.log(Effect.log("Hello").pipe(Effect.runPromise))
    // which has not 2 arguments
    console.log(Effect.runPromise(Effect.log("Hello")))
    
    // this instead should trigger, but the output should be
    // console.log(Effect.log("Hello").pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.runPromise))
    console.log(Effect.runPromise(Effect.ignore(Effect.log("Hello"))))
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377050: This nested call structure has a pipeable form. `Effect.log("Hello").pipe(...)` represents the same call sequence in pipe style and may be easier to read. effect(missedPipeableOpportunity)
    
    // this is silly, but shows how we can move back and forth between the two styles
    // I would expect it to be triggered, but the output should be
    // console.log(Effect.succeed(console.log(Effect.runPromise(Effect.log("Hello")))).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.runPromise))
    console.log(
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~
      Effect.runPromise(
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
        Effect.ignore(
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
          Effect.succeed(console.log(Effect.runPromise(Effect.log("Hello"))))
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
        )
    ~~~~~
      )
    ~~~
    )
    ~
!!! warning TS377050: This nested call structure has a pipeable form. `Effect.succeed(console.log(Effect.runPromise(Effect.log("Hello")))).pipe(...)` represents the same call sequence in pipe style and may be easier to read. effect(missedPipeableOpportunity)
